text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew… It's scary… just how good I am!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What, ya wanna know more? 
Fine, since you're practically beggin', 
I'll tell ya! You see…

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There were three sales going on at the same time. And I perfectly cruised through all three, buying up aaall the sale items on offer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You shoulda seen it. I was White Lightning, 
weavin' between folk on the crowded street!
